title: Equivalence checking of Verilog module fails
body:
I am trying to verify changes I made to a Verilog module by using the yosys equivalence checking.
As a first step I am trying to compare the unmodified module with itself in order to make sure the equivalence checking is working out.

The module I am currently checking is found here:

[dma_ram_demux_wr.v](https://github.com/alexforencich/verilog-pcie/blob/master/rtl/dma_ram_demux_wr.v)

The commands I am using in order to get the checking started are:

```
read_verilog dma_ram_demux_wr.v
prep -flatten -top dma_ram_demux_wr
splitnets -ports;;
design -stash gold
read_verilog dma_ram_demux_wr.v
prep -flatten -top dma_ram_demux_wr
splitnets -ports;;
design -stash gate
design -copy-from gold -as gold dma_ram_demux_wr
design -copy-from gate -as gate dma_ram_demux_wr
equiv_make gold gate equiv
prep -flatten -top equiv

opt_clean -purge
show -prefix equiv-prep -colors 1 -stretch

opt -full
equiv_simple -seq 5
equiv_induct -seq 5
equiv_status -assert
```

Eventually the check fails with the following message:

> ERROR: Found 196 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'.

I have tried increasing the number of steps involved up to 200, which didn't improve the situation.
For every step I am getting the following messages:

> Proving existence of base case for step 1. (35677 clauses over 14018 variables)                                                                                                                                                               > Proving induction step 1. (79153 clauses over 30375 variables)                                                                                         
> Proof for induction step failed. Extending to next time step.

It seems like Yosys is not able to solve the clauses. Am I missing something important here?
code_blocks:
read_verilog dma_ram_demux_wr.v
prep -flatten -top dma_ram_demux_wr
splitnets -ports;;
design -stash gold
read_verilog dma_ram_demux_wr.v
prep -flatten -top dma_ram_demux_wr
splitnets -ports;;
design -stash gate
design -copy-from gold -as gold dma_ram_demux_wr
design -copy-from gate -as gate dma_ram_demux_wr
equiv_make gold gate equiv
prep -flatten -top equiv

opt_clean -purge
show -prefix equiv-prep -colors 1 -stretch

opt -full
equiv_simple -seq 5
equiv_induct -seq 5
equiv_status -assert
